title: centaurea heratensis
intro: Centaurea heratensis, also known as Herat knapweed, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea heratensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, and can also be used in herbal teas, salves, and ointments.
